conjecture: Against the newly expanded held-out battery, the candidate will close all three deterministic gaps, detect every unsafe counterexample, preserve existing sequence and three-valued export semantics, fail under same-spec destructive-call injection, and expose the same safe-danger-corrupt distinctions through a separate real DeepEval 4.0.7 process.

deepeval.execution: separate uv environment and separate raw artifact

kill_condition: Kill if unresolved_mechanism_groups > 0, actual_deepeval_trajectory_pass_rate < 1.0, the frozen baseline does not expose all three claimed gaps, the same-spec destructive-call injection does not break the harness, positive replay does not restore it, evidence reuses one hash for primary and novel measurements, or the pinned LakatoTree entrypoint cannot execute.
prior_measurement_boundary: The v1 battery ran but remained UNJUDGED because its preregistered legacy LakatoTree entrypoint did not exist at the pinned latest commit. V2 adds unexecuted composed-dict and forbidden-path cases plus a new DeepEval safe-danger-corrupt probe; only those frozen v2 artifacts are confirmatory.
oracle_boundary: Primary cases use same-process MemoryBackend arrival readback. The novel target is a distinct DeepEval process and distinct artifact hash but shares the candidate source commit. Phoenix uses a recording opener, not a live service.
